diagrams.title: Authentication Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how password-based authentication works from user login to access grant
elements: Server retrieves stored hash and salt
Server hashes input password with salt
Server compares computed hash with stored hash
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete authentication workflow and security checks involved in password-based login systems.

diagrams.title: Password Attack Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of three major password attack types and their prevention methods
elements: Brute Force: All combinations, prevention: long passwords + lockout
Dictionary: Common words, prevention: password policy
Rainbow Table: Precomputed hashes, prevention: salting
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how different attacks work helps in understanding which security measures counter each threat.
